phrases.english: Take a deep breath, be bold.
Try again, you can do it.

phrases.slovenian: Uči se iz napak, postani močnejši.
phrases.transliteration: Oo-chee seh eez napak, postani moch-nay-shee.

phrases.english: Every effort counts, little by little.
phrases.slovenian: Vsak trud šteje, malo po malo.
phrases.transliteration: Vsak trood sh-teh-yeh, mal-o poh mal-o.

phrases.slovenian: Uči se vsak dan, rasti počasi.
phrases.transliteration: U-chi se vsak dan, rasti po-cha-si.

phrases.slovenian: Uči se slovenščino, korak za korakom.

phrases.english: Speak with courage, embrace the journey.
Every word counts, build your fluency.
phrases.slovenian: Vsaka beseda šteje, gradi svojo tekočnost.
phrases.transliteration: Vsa-ka be-se-da shte-yeh, gra-dee svo-yo te-ko-shnost.

phrases.english: I love you, more each day.
I am lost, can you help?
Little by little, we get there.
Slow and steady, wins the race.
Good things, take time to grow.

phrases.slovenian: Tako vesel, ne neham se smejati.
phrases.transliteration: Ta-ko ve-sel, ne ne-ham se sme-ya-ti.

phrases.english: Feeling so light, like a feather.
I am looking, for a gift.
Your effort matters, keep it up.
Be patient with yourself, progress happens.
New language, new world, open your mind.
phrases.slovenian: Nov jezik, nov svet, odpri um.
phrases.transliteration: Noov ye-zeek, noov svet, od-pree oom.

phrases.english: Enjoy the process, celebrate small wins.
phrases.slovenian: Uživaj v procesu, praznuj male zmage.
phrases.transliteration: Oo-zhee-va-y v pro-tse-soo, pra-z-nooy ma-leh zma-geh.

phrases.english: Slovenian is beautiful, let it flow.
This moment, is all there is.
phrases.slovenian: Ta trenutek, je vse kar je.
phrases.transliteration: Tah tre-noo-tek, yeh vseh kar yeh.

phrases.english: This means, a lot to me.
Even dark clouds, have silver linings.
phrases.slovenian: Tudi temni oblaki, imajo srebrne robove.
phrases.transliteration: Too-dee tem-nee oh-blah-kee, ee-mah-yoh sreb-ren-eh roh-boh-veh.

phrases.slovenian: Uči se iz preteklosti, živi zdaj.
phrases.transliteration: OO-chee seh eez preh-TEHK-los-tee, ZHEE-vee zdai.

phrases.slovenian: Ne boj se neuspeha, sprejmi učenje.
phrases.transliteration: Neh boy seh neh-oo-speh-hah, spreh-yee oo-chen-yeh.

phrases.english: Focus on your goal, keep moving.
You are capable, believe in yourself.
Push through, the end is near.
A gentle breeze, whispers through leaves.

phrases.slovenian: Oblaki se zbirajo, videti so sivi.
phrases.transliteration: Oh-blah-kee seh zb-ee-rah-yoh, vee-deh-tee soh see-vee.

phrases.english: Rain is falling, a soft pitter-patter.
Taste the tradition, feel the warmth.
Listen to the stories, in the mountains.
Share a smile, across the table.
Discover hidden paths, with a guide.
Sing the old songs, with heart.

phrases.slovenian: Moja duša, je našla svoj odmev.
phrases.transliteration: Moyah dooshah, yeh nahshlah svoy odmehv.

phrases.english: You paint my world, in color.
phrases.slovenian: Ti pobarvaš moj svet, v barve.
phrases.transliteration: Tee poh-bah-rvahsh moy s-vet, v bahr-veh.

phrases.english: We complete each other, you know?
My heart beats for you, truly.
You're my best friend, and more.
phrases.slovenian: Si moj najboljši prijatelj, pa še več.
phrases.transliteration: See moy nay-bol-yeesh pree-yah-tel, pah sheh vehch.

phrases.english: Journey ahead, one step, at a time.
phrases.slovenian: Pot naprej, en korak, za drugim.
phrases.transliteration: Pot napray, en korak, za drugim.

phrases.english: Each day, a little more progress.
Persistence, pays off, in the end.
Small efforts, lead to big wins.
phrases.slovenian: Mali napori, vodijo, do velikih zmag.
phrases.transliteration: Mali napori, vodijo, do velikih zmag.

phrases.english: You're my sunshine, on cloudy days.
phrases.slovenian: Moj sončni žarek, v oblačnih dneh.
phrases.transliteration: Moy son-chni zha-rek, v ob-lach-nikh dneh.

phrases.english: A friend like you, is rare.
You always know, what to say.
Unlock Slovenia's heart, word by word.
phrases.slovenian: Odkleni srce Slovenije, besedo za besedo.
phrases.transliteration: Odkleni srce Slovenije, besedo za besedo.

phrases.english: Hear the rhythm, speak the spirit.
Dive in deep, let words surprise.
phrases.slovenian: Potopite se globoko, naj besede presenetijo.
phrases.transliteration: Potopite se globoko, naj besede presenetijo.

phrases.english: Taste the culture, one phrase at time.
Save a little, live a lot.

phrases.slovenian: Tvoja slovenska pot, razvija se lepo.
phrases.transliteration: Tvoja slovenska pot, razvija se lepo.

phrases.english: A little bit nervous, yet excited.
Feeling a bit lost, seeking direction.
phrases.slovenian: Počutim se malo izgubljeno, iščem pot.
phrases.transliteration: Po-choo-teem se malo iz-gue-blie-no, ee-shchem pot.

phrases.english: A gentle breeze, through the trees.
You are stronger, than you think.
Where is the nearest train station?
Can I have the menu, please?
A ticket to Ljubljana, one way.
phrases.slovenian: Ena vozovnica, za Ljubljano, v eno smer.
phrases.transliteration: Eh-nah voh-zov-neets-ah, zah Lyub-lyah-noh, v eh-noh smer.

phrases.english: Is there a bus to the city center?
Could we, have some water, please?
Just a moment, please, I'm deciding.
My phone, is dead. Can I borrow yours?
phrases.slovenian: Moj telefon, je mrtev. Lahko posodim vašega?
phrases.transliteration: Moy tel-eh-fon, yeh mrtev. Lah-ko po-so-deem vah-she-gah?

phrases.english: I need to find, a quiet place.
Is this the correct, way to the station?
phrases.slovenian: Je to pravilen, način do postaje?
phrases.transliteration: Yeh toh prah-vee-len, nah-cheen doh po-stah-yeh?

phrases.english: I have a severe, allergic reaction.
Build your language, brick by brick.
phrases.slovenian: Gradite svoj jezik, opeko za opeko.
phrases.transliteration: Grah-dee-teh svoy yee-zik, oh-peh-koh zah oh-peh-koh.

phrases.english: Sow seeds of goodness, watch them grow.
